title: Decision: Choose Release Versioning Strategy (Date-Based vs Semver)
description:
Choose and document the release versioning strategy for the V3 codebase. docs/RELEASE.md documents both options but a decision must be made before proceeding.

## Options
- **A) Date-based**: e.g., v2026.02.23 — version tied to release date
- **B) Semver**: e.g., v1.0.0 — semantic versioning with major/minor/patch

The decision should align with whatever approach the team has been using historically. The key requirement is consistency going forward, especially since the next release marks the V3 codebase.
acceptance_criteria: Versioning strategy is chosen and documented
docs/RELEASE.md is updated with the chosen strategy
Deploy workflow is aligned with the versioning convention
Both developers are aligned on the strategy
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning Phase 1. The next code deployed will be the V3 codebase, so the versioning strategy must be locked before that release.
